title: refactor(frontend-enter): drop SSR guards and dedupe small frontend helpers
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Remove dead SSR `typeof window === "undefined"` guards across config.ts, index.tsx, sign-in.tsx, auto-top-up-panel.tsx — this is a pure client-side Vite SPA with no SSR/prerender path, so those branches are unreachable (kept the legitimate sessionStorage private-mode try/catch)
- Extract the duplicated hashchange state+listener into a generic `usePageFromHash(parse)` hook; each route keeps its own `pageFromHash` so routing is unchanged
- Drop the speculative `action` param from `getDisabledReason` (one caller, always `"saving changes"`) — tooltip text byte-identical
- Collapse the near-identical `getInputSortValue`/`getOutputSortValue` into one `sortValueFromFields` + explicit INPUT/OUTPUT price-field arrays typed against the shared `PriceDefinition`

Verified non-breaking: biome clean on all 6 files; `tsc --noEmit` introduces zero new type errors (only pre-existing/environmental ones, proven by a stash-and-recompile baseline). Net −60 lines. Re-verified against current main after #11439 landed.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the frontend
gist.blurb: Swept away some dead code and simplified our frontend helpers. A cleaner codebase means faster updates for the hive!
gist.summary: Removed unreachable SSR guards and deduplicated routing and sorting helpers across the enter.pollinations.ai frontend.
gist.impact: This internal refactor reduces technical debt and simplifies the codebase by removing 60 lines of dead code without changing any user-facing behavior.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a small broom, sweeping up pixelated dead leaves (representing dead code) in a cozy digital garden, assisted by the monitor robot holding a dustpan.
